claim: The legacy 13-parent fourth-level ordinary-cover partition has 790 unique branches: 406 replayed UNSAT, 32 measured timeouts, and 352 unmeasured, hence 384 open at that layer.
claim_limit: This independently validates the fourth-level ledger that later committed fifth-level work builds on. It does not supersede the newer fifth-level frontier, prove C(11,5,3) uniqueness, or determine C(12,6,4).
hypothesis: All recorded fourth-level structure and 406 UNSAT closures reconstruct, but the exact legacy open count is 384 rather than 416.

decisive_result.negative_control: Removing the canonical positive unit from intersection-4-third-04-fourth-014 changed the exact-CNF hash and DRAT-trim returned 1.

failed_controls.finding: The initially selected leaf's proof also verified after its canonical positive unit was removed; the control leaf was unsuitable, while all positive replays passed.
The DRAT-trim rejection text contained NOT VERIFIED; a substring parser incorrectly treated it as success.
All mathematical checks passed, but writing a new artifacts/audits directory was denied by the workspace ownership boundary.

search_efficiency.before: 5246 eligible labelled fourth blocks across 13 parents
search_efficiency.soundness: Independent cell-membership stabilizers, exact CNF hashes, full recipe coverage, and proof replay.

next_session.objective: Audit the newer committed fifth-level and deficit-partition receipts against this independently validated fourth-level base before allocating more solve work.
next_session.first_action: Read the immutable fifth-level/deficit audit manifests introduced by commits d42ef10 and 76547fe, verify every parent binding resolves to one of this receipt's 384 open fourth-level IDs, then identify the exact current certified/open frontier.
next_session.stop_condition: Stop or repair on any parent-ID, CNF hash, recipe, proof, or aggregate-accounting mismatch; a directly validated nonisomorphic ordinary cover immediately redirects the route.

tool_disclosure: GPT-5 Sol principal designed and executed the audit. One injected GPT-5.6 Terra delegate memo supplied advisory reconnaissance; every relied-on claim was independently regenerated. Deterministic Python 3.12.3, python-sat 1.9.dev7 for DIMACS compatibility, and the pinned local DRAT-trim binary performed the checks. Web search rechecked the official source and primary bibliographic pages.
